de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class JavaCardDLStrategy

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.StaticFeatureCollection
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.AbstractFeatureStrategy
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.JavaCardDLStrategy
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Feature, Strategy
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    SimplifyTermStrategy, SymbolicExecutionStrategy

    public class JavaCardDLStrategy
extends AbstractFeatureStrategy
    Strategy tailored to be used as long as a java program can be found in the sequent.

      • setupInstantiationF

        private RuleSetDispatchFeature setupInstantiationF()

      • setClassAxiomInstantiation

        private void setClassAxiomInstantiation(RuleSetDispatchFeature d)

      • setupInstantiationWithoutRetry

        private void setupInstantiationWithoutRetry(RuleSetDispatchFeature d)
        For taclets that need instantiation, but where the instantiation is deterministic and does not have to be repeated at a later point, we setup the same feature terms both in the cost computation method and in the instantiation method. The definitions in setupInstantiationWithoutRetry should give cost infinity to those incomplete rule applications that will never be instantiated (so that these applications can be removed from the queue and do not have to be considered again).

      • name

        public Name name()
        Description copied from interface: Named
        returns the name of this element
        Returns:
        the name of the element

      • computeCost

        public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app,
                               PosInOccurrence pio,
                               Goal goal)
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pio - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

      • isApprovedApp

        public final boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app,
                                   PosInOccurrence pio,
                                   Goal goal)
        Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
        Returns:
        true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

      • instantiateApp

        protected RuleAppCost instantiateApp(RuleApp app,
                                     PosInOccurrence pio,
                                     Goal goal)
        Specified by:
        instantiateApp in class AbstractFeatureStrategy

      • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

        public boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
        Description copied from interface: Strategy
        Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non closeable Goal.
        Returns:
        true stop, false continue on other Goals.
